action.reasoning: Observation: Val AP=0.2602 at epoch 110, eval score 0.2530 (new best). Model plateauing - only ~0.002 improvement over 40 epochs. Each epoch ~70s. 2.83h remaining, 14 iterations left. Analysis: The model is slowly converging. The extreme class imbalance (1.4% positive) is a key challenge. Adding pos_weight to BCE loss could significantly boost AP by making the model focus more on positive examples. I'll resume from current checkpoint and add pos_weight computed from training data. Also, I'll try training for 40 more epochs. Decision: Modify train.py to compute and use per-task pos_weight, resume from checkpoint, train 40 more epochs.
